arts.ttl: 'I'm a football fan like everybody else' - Millwall boss Alex Neil on VAR and Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Millwall head coach Alex Neil says his players will not be impacted by the presence of VAR in Saturday's eagerly anticipated FA Cup showdown with local rivals Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Want to Sign ‘Absolutely Phenomenal’ England Ace to Replace Guehi
arts.sum: Crystal Palace could opt to sign one of the Premier League's soon-to-be-relegated stars if he comes onto the market

arts.ttl: Former Man United chief Ed Woodward approached over board role with Crystal Palace owners Eagle Football Holdings - three years after his acrimonious Old Trafford departure
arts.sum: During Woodward's 17-year tenure, the club failed to win Premier League honours and fans criticised his emphasis on commerciality over the club's success on the pitch.

arts.ttl: 'On the ball, unbelievable': Marc Guehi says £22m talent wanted by Arsenal and Spurs is a 'really top player'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur may not be evenly matched in the Premier League this season, but they are likely to be in direct competition in...

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Derby County suffer big David Ozoh blow after John Eustace update
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Speaking ahead of the clash against Middlesbrough this weekend, Eustace said: "Unfortunately, David will be missing for the rest of the season which is a big blow to the group.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Millwall: FA Cup prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Southeast London neighbours meet in the FA Cup fifth round

arts.ttl: Club legend Puncheon reflects on Palace pinnacle
arts.sum: Jason Puncheon played a huge part in Crystal Palace's modern day history, helping establish the Eagles as a Premier League club - and rates the first season in the top-flight as his best achievement during his time in South London.
Ian Wilkerson has taken a look at all eight FA Cup fifth round ties this weekend and has a score pick for each clash.

arts.ttl: ‘You do need to think about certain things’ - Millwall defender Japhet Tanganga on VAR in operation for Palace FA Cup tie
arts.sum: “For myself, having played with VAR in the Premier League, then definitely subconsciously you do think about certain things that you may or may not get away with,” Tanganga told the South London Press . “You have definitely got to keep in mind that there are certain things you might not be able to do because pretty much there are cameras everywhere and they can see all sorts of angles – but you also shouldn’t lose yourself though and not play your game.”
